message:
fix(http): reject compound Transfer-Encoding to prevent request smuggling (bd-uz2s)

Tighten is_chunked_encoding() to require an exact "chunked" match
(case-insensitive, trimmed) instead of a substring search. The old
contains_ignore_ascii_case helper accepted compound codings like
"gzip, chunked", which the server cannot decode—creating a request
smuggling vector when behind a reverse proxy that can.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
